calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Second And Supplemental Order Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. RYAN L. DAHM, ESQ. of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC (Tel: 415-989-4730) appearing for plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SECOND AND SUPPLEMENTAL ORDER FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER, AND TURNOVER OVER.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the judge pro tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s unopposed motion is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
